The user wants me to identify all time segments where Donald Trump is visible in the video.

1.  **Analyze the video:** I'll scan through the video, noting the start and end times of each shot where Donald Trump appears.
2.  **Identify segments:**
    *   00:00 - 01:22: Trump is sitting next to the Saudi Crown Prince.
    *   02:23 - 03:20: Trump is sitting next to the Saudi Crown Prince.
    *   03:30 - 03:36: Close-up of Trump speaking.
    *   03:59 - 04:42: Trump is sitting next to the Saudi Crown Prince.
    *   05:01 - 05:07: Close-up of Trump speaking.
    *   05:10 - 05:52: Close-up of Trump speaking.
    *   05:52 - 06:11: Trump is sitting next to the Saudi Crown Prince.
    *   06:53 - 07:29: Trump is sitting next to the Saudi Crown Prince.

    *   11:31 - 11:34: Trump is sitting next to the Saudi Crown Prince.
    *   11:43 - 12:44: Trump is sitting next to the Saudi Crown Prince.

3.  **Format the output:** I will create a JSON object with these segments, specifying the start time, end time, presence (upper-body), face visibility (true), and region (right or center-right).

*   Segment 1: 00:00 - 01:22
*   Segment 2: 02:23 - 03:20

I will combine adjacent segments if they are continuous or very close, but looking at the timestamps, there are cuts to other people (reporters, other officials) in between. So I will keep them separate as per the instruction "Split whenever Donald Trump leaves the frame or at shot boundaries."
